prompt: Top-down flat-lay tight detail of a clipboard holding a yellow legal pad. The legal pad has handwritten notes — but the writing is intentionally indistinct cursive scrawl, illegible loops and dashes, no readable letters or words, just the visual rhythm of someone's handwritten checklist with bullet points and check-mark ticks. A black ballpoint pen rests across the top. A few coffee-cup ring stains on the cardboard underneath. Shot with a 100mm macro lens directly overhead, soft morning window light from the left, gentle shadow falloff. Slightly desaturated palette, a red mechanical pencil with a worn eraser sits next to the clipboard as the only saturated color. Working-contractor catalog feel, NOT HGTV bright. No readable text — the writing is intentionally pure visual rhythm without legible letters.
